title: An emergency service provider doesn’t need a work permit - Canada.ca
content:
## To work in Canada as an emergency service provider
You’ll help out in an emergency. You’ll be in Canada to help preserve life or property. Emergencies include natural disasters, such as
- industrial accidents that threaten  the environment
If this describes you, you don’t need a work permit.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
